zh.Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland: 蘇格蘭米德洛迪安克萊頓
zh.Cramstoun Ridell, Midlothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle於1435年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安克萊頓時，他的父親Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar27歲，母親Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson21歲。他於1460年之前與Deborah Erskine在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1465年在蘇格蘭艾丁波享年30歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland: 苏格兰米德洛迪安克萊頓
zh-hans.Cramstoun Ridell, Midlothian, Scotland: 英国苏格兰米德洛迪安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle于1435年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安克萊頓时，他的父亲Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar27岁，母亲Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson21岁。他于1460年之前与Deborah Erskine在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1465年在苏格兰艾丁波享年30岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle was born in 1435, in Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, was 21. He married Deborah Erskine before 1460, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1465, in Edinburgh, Scotland, at the age of 30, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle est né en 1435, à Crichton, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann d’Erskine Baroness Gibson, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Deborah Erskine avant 1460, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1465, à Edinburgh, Écosse, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Edinburgh, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle 1435 in Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson 21. Er hat vor 1460 in Schottland, United Kingdom Deborah Erskine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1465 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Edinburgh, Scotland und wurde in Edinburgh, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle è nato il nel 1435 nel Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Deborah Erskine prima del 1460, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1465, nel Edinburgh, Scotland, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Edinburgh, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddleが1435年にスコットランドミドロスアンクリチトンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquharは27歳，母Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibsonは21歳であった。1460年以前にイギリススコットランドでDeborah Erskineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1465年にスコットランドエディンブルグで30歳で死去し，スコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle(이)가 1435년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 크리튼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1460년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Deborah Erskine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 스컷랜드 에딘버그에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에딘버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle nasceu em 1435, em Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Deborah Erskine antes 1460, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1465, em Edinburgh, Scotland, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Edinburgh, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle родился в 1435 г. в местности кричтон, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Deborah Erskine перед 1460 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1465 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности эдинбург, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle nació en 1435, en Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Deborah Erskine antes de 1460, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1465, en Edinburgh, Scotland, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Edinburgh, Scotland.
